title: castilleja tenella
intro: Castilleja tenella, also known as Painted Lady, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Castilleja tenella include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce anxiety. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to support its medicinal properties.
